title: Senior Product Manager
description:
Our client, one of Asia-Pacific’s leading organizations is looking for:
Senior Product Manager

Responsibilities:

  • Engage agency Product Owner to establish clear product vision and requirements
  • Deﬁne product go-to-market strategy and execute with relevant partners
  • Develop product outreach and promotion strategies
  • Maintain strategic roadmaps aligned with organisational objectives
  • Design, test, and iterate through experiments to improve user journey
  • Manage product budget (expenditure monitoring, cashﬂow management, securing funding)
  • Develop workplan with product team and provide sufficient resources
  • Procure software, hardware, and ICT professional services as needed
  • Translate product strategy into technical, actionable plans for business and vendor teams
  • Co-create budget papers with Product Owner to seek development resources
  • Run efficient meetings and maintain stakeholder communication
  • Formulate strong proposals by evaluating pros and cons of different solutions and provide compelling justifications
  • Consider how services could be delivered for different user segments and prioritise feature development
  • Drive user adoption and growth through engagement and feature expansion
  • Maintain network with user agencies and government product teams
  • Ensure products meet security/performance requirements (SSAT, VAPT, Performance Testing)
  • Adhere to compliance requirements and audits (IM, AGO, QMS)
  • Participate in engagements to raise product awareness

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Cybersecurity, or a related field with 8 years of relevant experience.
  • Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering or related field
  • Minimum 8 years relevant experience in product management
  • Prior experience in IT business analysis, application solution design and testing
  • Experience working directly with engineers, designers, and product teams
  • Proven track record of delivering successful products from scratch
  • Experience in product operations and maintenance activities
  • Proficiency in modern product development practices (Agile, Cloud, Design Thinking)
  • Strong analytical, conceptualization and problem-solving skills
  • Budget management and resource planning experience
  • Understanding of system monitoring and operational excellence practices
  • Strong product and project management capabilities
  • Government sector experience, Healthcare industry knowledge, Digital transformation background, Experience with public health, DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering exposure, Experience with cloud platforms and modern infrastructure are preferred

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Interested applicants can also email CV at jagveer@nsearchglobal.com (for faster processing, please state the exact job / position title applied “Senior Product Manager”

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
